ORDER PURSUANT TO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - MOTION OF PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION BE, AND HEREBY IS, GRANTED. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANN M MURTAGH THE PRINCIPAL SUM OF $1,781.67, AND COURT COSTS PURSUANT TO A MEMORANDUM OF COSTS. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.)

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DISCOVER BANK IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT ANN MURTAUGH IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,781.67 PLUS COST PER THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS PROCEDURE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600 (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2018 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar May-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication - Plaintiff Discover Bank's motion for summary judgment is granted. Discover Bank is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Ann Murtaugh in the amount of $1,781.67 plus cost per the memorandum of costs procedure. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
